Home / Cookie Policy

Cookie Policy

How cookies and local browser storage are used on the site.

This Cookie Policy explains what cookies and similar technologies may be used on Beat the Scam.

Essential storage

The site stores a small preference in your browser to remember whether you accepted or rejected non-essential cookies. This supports compliance and avoids repeatedly showing the same banner after a choice has been made.

Analytics cookies

If you accept analytics cookies, Google Analytics 4 may collect information about page views, device type, referral source, and interaction patterns so site performance can be measured and improved.

Advertising cookies

If advertising is active and you consent, Google AdSense may use cookies or similar technologies to support ad delivery, frequency management, measurement, and related services.

How to manage cookies

You can change browser cookie settings at any time. You can also clear the stored preference locally if you want the banner to appear again on your device.

Contact

Questions about cookies or data use can be sent to hello@beatthescam.com.

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.

Educational content only. Not legal, regulatory, or financial advice.

Cookies & privacy

We use analytics and advertising cookies to understand performance and support the site. You can accept or reject non-essential cookies.
